CREDIT AGREEMENT

This Credit Agreement (this "Agreement") is entered into as of January 1, 2024, by and between XYZ Corporation ("Borrower") and ABC Bank ("Lender").

ARTICLE I - DEFINITIONS

Section 1.1. Defined Terms. As used in this Agreement, the following terms shall have the meanings set forth below:

TermDefinition
BorrowerXYZ Corporation, a Delaware corporation
CommitmentThe aggregate amount of $50,000,000
Maturity DateJanuary 1, 2029

ARTICLE II - THE CREDIT FACILITY

Section 2.1. Commitment. Subject to the terms and conditions hereof, the Lender agrees to make loans to the Borrower from time to time during the Availability Period.

Section 2.2. Interest Rate. Each loan shall bear interest at a rate per annum equal to the Applicable Rate plus the Base Rate.

(a) The "Base Rate" means the greater of (i) the Federal Funds Rate plus 0.50%, and (ii) the Prime Rate.

(b) The "Applicable Rate" means 2.00% per annum.

ARTICLE III - REPRESENTATIONS AND WARRANTIES

Section 3.1. Organization. The Borrower is a corporation duly organized, validly existing, and in good standing under the laws of the State of Delaware.

Section 3.2. Authorization. The execution, delivery, and performance of this Agreement have been duly authorized by all necessary corporate action.

Page Header - Credit Agreement

ARTICLE IV - COVENANTS

Section 4.1. Financial Reporting. The Borrower shall deliver to the Lender annual audited financial statements within 90 days of fiscal year end.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.

XYZ Corporation

By: _________________________

Name: John Executive

Title: Chief Executive Officer

ABC Bank

By: _________________________

Name: Sarah Banker

Title: Managing Director
